query:
UPDATE settings
            SET
                max_concurrent_writes = $1,
                max_concurrent_downloads = $2,

                theme = $3,
                locale = $4,
                default_page = $5,
                collapsed_navigation = $6,
                advanced_rendering = $7,
                native_decorations = $8,

                discord_rpc = $9,
                developer_mode = $10,
                telemetry = $11,
                personalized_ads = $12,

                onboarded = $13,

                extra_launch_args = jsonb($14),
                custom_env_vars = jsonb($15),
                file_links = jsonb($16),
                mc_memory_max = $17,
                mc_force_fullscreen = $18,
                mc_game_resolution_x = $19,
                mc_game_resolution_y = $20,
                hide_on_process_start = $21,

                hook_pre_launch = $22,
                hook_wrapper = $23,
                hook_post_exit = $24,

                custom_dir = $25,
                prev_custom_dir = $26,
                migrated = $27,

                toggle_sidebar = $28,
                feature_flags = $29,
                hide_nametag_skins_page = $30,

                skipped_update = $31,
                pending_update_toast_for_version = $32,
                auto_download_updates = $33,

                version = $34
